Subject: Here's what you should stream in June
Body: Streamline is back with some top-notch recommendations НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ НҸ вҖҢ Hi Streamers,What have you been watching lately?I'm so sad that "Ted Lasso" has come to an end. My mother and I devoured the Apple TV+ show from the moment it premiered in 2020. The final season admittedly wasn't my favorite, but I still enjoyed the ride and am hopeful that the suggestion of a potential spin-off turns into a reality. Five seasons in, I've finally decided to check out "Formula 1: Drive to Survive" on Netflix (much to the delight of my partner who is a massive fan). I never would've thought a reality show about professional auto racing would be so captivating to me, but I've already binged the first couple of seasons -- and might be looking into opportunities to attend a race in the future. Now, letвҖҷs get to some reader recommendations:Margaret Nellor writes, "If you like police procedurals, I highly recommend 'Karen Pirie' on BritBox. The first season consists of three episodes, with Detective Sergeant Karen Pirie reopening a cold case involving a murdered barmaid. She is one tough smart cookie. Her interactions with her superiors are awesome for all of us who have bosses that need significant eye rolls and cause teeth-clenching. Her reactions to her bosses are stellar. SheвҖҷs solving this crimeвҖҰperiod, but doing it the right way (this time round)."And Dianne Riley writes, "'Faraway,' a movie on Netflix, is so good! ItвҖҷs funny, romantic and earthy. Another one was a surprise -- 'Then Came Love' on Hulu, starring Craig Ferguson and Kathie Lee Gifford. It was so much fun. I also highly recommend 'The Night Agent,' a series on Netflix."Meanwhile, reader Connie Bronstein is a big fan of "The Sinner" on Netflix. And F. Heggi enjoys the HBO series "Patria." As always, please let me know your recent streaming recommendations by emailing them to streamline@huffpost.com.And see more from Streamline below: Here's What's Coming To Netflix In June Here's What's Leaving Netflix In June 'Succession' Gave Us Its Final 'F**k Off' вҖ” And Stuck The Landing The New Series In 'The Ultimatum' Franchise Is Surprisingly Good This Netflix Show Is Better Than 'Bridgerton' вҖ” And There's A Big Reason Why Does somebody keep forwarding you this newsletter? вҖ” Subscribe here! Subject: [opensuse] Fwd: Hang while accessing some /proc info
Body: Sending again as I was unsubscribed (?!) ---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Ciro Iriarte Date: 10-feb-2008 11:36 Subject: Hang while accessing some /proc info To: OpenSuSE-en Just tried to access some ACPI info from my PC running 10.3 and the shell just hangs there, is this usual (i assume it's not normal) -------------------------------- mainwks:~> cat /proc/acpi/fan/FAN/state -------------------------------- ------------------------ mainwks:~ # cat /proc/acpi/thermal_zone/THRM/temperature ----------------------- It never returns... Other entries for fine: ---------------------- mainwks:~ # cat /proc/acpi/processor/C000/info processor id: 0 acpi id: 0 bus mastering control: yes power management: no throttling control: no limit interface: no ---------------------- ---------------------- mainwks:~ # cat /proc/acpi/processor/C000/limit ---------------------- Ciro

Subject: Re: [perl #46047] Not OK: perl v5.6.2 on amd64-freebsd 6.2-release
Body: On 2007ГўвӮ¬вҖң10ГўвӮ¬вҖң03, at 22:00, djzyiw@cpan.org (via RT) wrote: > t/lib/ipc_sysv.......................semget: No space left on device > FAILED at test 7 > ext/IPC/SysV/t/sem...................semget: 28 No space left on > device > FAILED at test 1 Are you using a kernel with SYSV semaphore support? You might well get this error if you asked a kernel that didn't have it to allocate a semaphore for you. I'm not a FreeBSD person, but it appears that you need a line in your configuration file in order to get a a kernel that is built with them. From : options SYSVSEM # SYSV-style semaphores Support for System V semaphores. Less commonly used but only adds a few hundred bytes to the kernel -- Dominic Dunlop
text:
Re: [perl #46047] Not OK: perl v5.6.2 on amd64-freebsd 6.2-release

On 2007ГўвӮ¬вҖң10ГўвӮ¬вҖң03, at 22:00, djzyiw@cpan.org (via RT) wrote: > t/lib/ipc_sysv.......................semget: No space left on device > FAILED at test 7 > ext/IPC/SysV/t/sem...................semget: 28 No space left on > device > FAILED at test 1 Are you using a kernel with SYSV semaphore support? You might well get this error if you asked a kernel that didn't have it to allocate a semaphore for you. I'm not a FreeBSD person, but it appears that you need a line in your configuration file in order to get a a kernel that is built with them. From : options SYSVSEM # SYSV-style semaphores Support for System V semaphores. Less commonly used but only adds a few hundred bytes to the kernel -- Dominic Dunlop

Subject: there goes the neighbourhood
Body: http://www.breakingnews.ie/ireland/mhmhaueymhey/ Gardai have recovered two handguns and three explosive devices during a raid targeting INLA criminals in Dublin. Ammunition and other paraphernalia were also found during a search of a premises on Stanhope Street yesterday evening. One man was arrested at the scene. Gardai say the operation targeted Dublin-based members of the INLA with links to organised criminals.
